active_patterns.name: OpenClaw Ecosystem Expansion
evidence: 2026-02-19: OpenAI acquisition confirmed (1902 upvotes Reddit), 720-comment thread on 'Anyone actually using OpenClaw?'
active_patterns.actionable_note: Track 2 more days. If repo creation rate holds, write OpenClaw ecosystem map explainer.
active_patterns.content_angle: The OpenClaw ecosystem is fragmenting into UI layers, orchestrators, and runtimes. Map the landscape before it consolidates.

active_patterns.name: Agent Security Tooling Wave
evidence: 2026-02-19: agent-vault (secret management), radius (shell command interception), eBPF agent tracer, sandstorm (sandboxed agents) all active
active_patterns.actionable_note: Watch for 2 more security tools this week. If confirmed, write 'Agent Security Stack' deep analysis.
active_patterns.content_angle: We're building the containment infrastructure before agents have actually broken anything. The anxiety is ahead of the threat.

active_patterns.name: Model Release Velocity Acceleration
evidence: 5 major model releases in 4 days across 5 different companies
active_patterns.actionable_note: Supports a 'model triage' content format. Consider tweet scorecard or short explainer ranking which models matter for which use cases.
active_patterns.content_angle: Coding benchmark crown changes owners monthly. The real differentiation is moving to agent capabilities.

active_patterns.name: AI Productivity Paradox Discourse
evidence: 2026-02-19: CEPR European productivity study (154pts, 121 comments), 'AI made coding more enjoyable' (43pts, 43 comments)
active_patterns.actionable_note: Evergreen article opportunity. No rush. Best when you have a strong personal thesis to argue.
active_patterns.content_angle: Everyone's debating whether AI boosts productivity. The real question is whether we're measuring the right kind of productivity.
